description_long: This is a freestanding industrial-style shelving cabinet with a rectangular form and a sturdy metal frame. The top and shelves are made of a dark reddish-brown wood, while the front and back feature a black metal mesh grid, providing both ventilation and visibility into the interior. The cabinet has three spacious shelves, creating four open compartments for storage or display. The mesh doors are divided vertically and horizontally, suggesting they may open outward, and the overall construction appears robust and suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or lofts. The sides are solid wood panels, and the cabinet stands on short metal feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. No visible handles or glass panels are present, and the interior is currently empty.
description: A robust, industrial-style shelving cabinet with a metal mesh front and back, dark wood shelves, and a solid wood top and sides. It features three open shelves and a sturdy metal frame, ideal for urban or workshop settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black metal mesh doors divided into four sections, framed by a metal border.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, dark reddish-brown wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open shelving structure with three wooden shelves and a mesh back for ventilation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the solid wood panel.
